title: ggen-process-mining BFS alignment
changes: Replaced stub compute_alignment (returned empty cost:0 steps:[]) with BFS/greedy implementation
For each trace event: emits SyncMove if matching transition is enabled, else LogMove
After trace: emits ModelMove for remaining enabled transitions (bounded by transition count)
Added test_alignment_two_event_trace_produces_sync_move_with_zero_cost: verifies a two-event [A,B] trace against a matching net produces at least one SyncMove and cost==0
